description_long: This is a sealed bag of Lay's potato chips, featuring a vibrant red background with the Lay's logo prominently displayed in the center. The front of the bag shows appetizing images of potato chips and the flavor indication 'Salt • Sare' in white and yellow text. The packaging is made of a glossy, flexible plastic material, slightly puffed due to the air inside. The back of the bag contains nutritional information, ingredients, and additional branding, all printed in multiple languages. The sides of the bag are narrow and crimped, showing the seam and the thinness of the packaging.
description: A glossy red Lay's potato chips bag with the logo, flavor text, and chip images on the front, and nutritional labeling on the back.
description_view_0: The front view displays the Lay's logo, flavor text 'Salt • Sare', and images of potato chips on a red background.
description_view_1: The side view shows the narrow, crimped edge of the bag, revealing its thin profile and sealed seam.
description_view_2: The back view features nutritional information, ingredients, and additional branding details printed on the packaging.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the crimped edge and the curvature of the bag, with partial chip graphics visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular Lay's logo in white and yellow is prominently displayed on the front center of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'Salt • Sare' and images of plain potato chips on the front indicate a salted flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the bag in a white panel.
